title: Facility pricing_json — sub-shape
description: Facility pricing configuration. Referenced by facility.schema.json.properties.pricing_json. Four models: per_hour, per_slot, per_person, included_in_membership. Every mutation writes to audits with 7-year financial retention.

currency.description: ISO 4217 3-letter currency code. MUST match parent branch.region.currency (observer enforces).

tiers.description: Rate tiers. Required when model != included_in_membership. Non-empty in that case. When present alongside model=included_in_membership, tiers are ignored.

peak_hours.description: Optional day-shape multiplier map. Same key structure as availability_json but each window carries a multiplier float.

name.description: Display name (e.g. Standard, Member, Guest, Senior). Rendered to bookers when multiple tiers apply.

rate_cents.description: Rate in the facility's currency. For per_hour: cents/hour. For per_slot: cents/booking. For per_person: cents/attendee.

requires_membership.description: When true, this tier only applies when the booker holds an active membership.

requires_age_band.description: When set, the tier applies only when the booker's profile.age_band matches.

multiplier.description: Float multiplier applied to the base tier rate for windows overlapping this peak. e.g. 1.5 = 50% surcharge.

x-invariants: when model IN (per_hour, per_slot, per_person): tiers is non-empty
when model = included_in_membership: booking price is 0, but a Pass covering the facility MUST be available at booking-time
tier picker precedence: age_band + membership matches win over Standard; ties broken by first match in array order
peak_hours multipliers apply to the resolved tier rate; a booking straddling peak/off-peak proportions by minute count

x-examples.notes: Booking price is 0. A valid Pass covering this facility MUST be available at booking time.
